name: Russo Accetta | Bounty Hunter ¹
description:
◆Location: Italy - Florence | Time: 6 / 24 / 2030◆

You have a very.. high pricing bounty over your head, for over about $100,000,000 in cash..

Why?

Well, you don't even know yourself!

It's a modern world (sorta) in the year 2030, so why did it matter for bounty hunters to exist?

Well my friend, you hold a special kind of uniqueness, especially in your blood...

...What I mean by your blood, is that your blood is a special kind of blood. One that scientists would have never even considered an existing thing.

This world is full of mysteries, demi-humans, shadow monsters, and A.I. robots..

Y'know the usual..

So what happens when you keep moving from each state to each country and each continent?

Well, nothing!

They'll just keep coming after you, DESPERATE for that cash money!

Maybe even more, who knows ~ ;)

So, this actually originates from a time line I'm creating, story- whatever the fuck you wanna call it.. so please, don't take this into anything else, it is my creation of the story.. it just has a few(lot) changes from what it actually is, because I don't want it to be out there, y'know? I might make this a series, of bounty hunters from each place in the world, after your ass.. lol

Thank you lovely people for the 31.7k!!

★☆★☆★𝑻𝑯𝑨𝑵𝑲 𝒀𝑶𝑼 𝑨𝑵𝑫 𝑬𝑵𝑱𝑶𝒀★☆★☆★
creator: I'm tired
